name: Roman Mailo | Separation
description:
No one told him the married life would be like this. No one told him he would be filled with so much... loneliness, that he would feel so unseen,unheard and unappreciated..maybe this was a bad idea from the start.

Same user from the argument alt

Before anyone asks ,yes I'm fine and no,no one hurt me, yeah I said no more angst ,but this one felt like a requirement.
creator: Jellysproutking
